title: Connected Boards column in Workflow
excerpt:

posts.author: alakkotrypis (Alexander Lakkotrypis)
posts.cookedHtml:
I wanted to create a workflow that tracks what was discussed in previous meetings & follows up in case anything prioritized is still not completed, as per our last meeting.

When I create the board for the meetings, I included the Connected Boards column, 2-way connection and select the board with all the tickets we are developing. So in each meeting we select and prioritize 5-6 tickets. After 2 weeks I want an email with all the selected items from the connected board we had decided to prioritize, and maybe a mirror column with their current statuses. See below the simple meetings board:

Screenshot 2024-08-29 1259211447×406 30.5 KB

The attempted workflow:

Screenshot 2024-08-29 1258021114×709 47.6 KB

Currently the Connected Boards column is not available in the e-mail feature/action of Workflow. I believe it would be an amazing feature to have e.g. lists all selected items from the connected board (like in the cells of an exported Excel file).

Take it 1 step further and include the mirror status of a connected item to be the trigger of Workflows as well! (I’ll do a separate feature request for this anyway)
